name: Curtis Gambrel Garage Plan - 12x16 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Storage | DIY Shed & Workshop Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roofline that increases overhead storage and interior workspace.
The 12x16 footprint provides ample room for lawn equipment, motorcycles, ATVs, tools, or a compact workshop setup.
The gambrel roof design naturally creates overhead loft space ideal for seasonal storage, tool organization, or shelving.
Straightforward framing and practical dimensions make Curtis an approachable project for beginner builders and experienced DIY enthusiasts.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Curtis Gambrel Garage - a practical 12x16 barn-style garage and storage building designed for durability, efficiency, and classic rural charm. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Curtis maximizes interior headroom while delivering the timeless look of a traditional barn structure. Its compact footprint, smart proportions, and DIY-friendly construction make it an excellent solution for homeowners looking to add organized storage or workshop...
